column3: Re-examine Cache-control Directives: intentional for server-rendered dynamic pages
Cross-Domain JavaScript Source File Inclusion: intentional use of Google reCAPTCHA and Analytics
Information Disclosure - Suspicious Comments: comments in third-party library source files (flexslider, mustache)
Non-Storable Content: intentional; server-rendered pages must not be cached by intermediaries
Modern Web Application: informational only, not a vulnerability
Session Management Response Identified: informational; standard ASP.NET antiforgery mechanism
Absence of Anti-CSRF Tokens: false positive; ASP.NET MVC uses antiforgery tokens on POST endpoints, not visible in GET responses
Sub Resource Integrity Attribute Missing: Google Fonts and Font Awesome CDN vary by query params; SRI not feasible
